notes: v1.0.9 — Real-time card scan push: SYC card taps now reach the web instantly via a window 'kiosk:card' CustomEvent, window.kiosk.on('card', cb), and the legacy window.onKioskCardScan callback (no more button press needed). WebView scrollbars hidden (native flags + CSS injection on every page) so the kiosk reads cleanly under any web app. New integration docs at /docs.html covering print, ESC/POS formatting, raster QR, card events, full API, and troubleshooting. Carries forward: native QR via printBytes raster path (works around MASUNG ignoring GS(k), self-relaunch after OTA install (MY_PACKAGE_REPLACED receiver), Poppins typography, cancellable OTA, HugeIcons, persistent HOME launcher pin, three admin exit actions.
